pattern: Customers express frustration over delays in processing deposits.
product_or_process_recommendation: Improve deposit processing times and provide regular updates to customers during the waiting period.

pattern: Customers express dissatisfaction when they are not informed of document rejection.
product_or_process_recommendation: Implement a notification system to inform customers promptly when documents are rejected or require resubmission.

pattern: Customers experience confusion or dissatisfaction regarding account access issues.
product_or_process_recommendation: Enhance clarity in communication regarding account access policies and provide proactive support to affected customers.
